page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Configure dictation, model endpoints and app behavior. Changes apply instantly — no save needed.

provider_rollback.title: Reverted to OpenLoaf SaaS
provider_rollback.description: Your {{which}} custom provider didn't pass the test — switched to the cloud service
provider_rollback.confirm_description: Your {{which}} custom provider hasn't been validated yet, so it can't be applied. Closing now will revert to the OpenLoaf SaaS cloud service.

hotkeys.reset_all_confirm: Reset all hotkeys to their defaults?

general.translate_target_lang_hint: When the translate-dictation hotkey fires, the transcript is translated into this language and then injected at the cursor.
general.translate_output_mode_hint: "Bilingual" keeps the source and appends the translation; "Target only" outputs just the translation, faster.
general.show_dock_hint: Show the OpenSpeech icon in the macOS Dock for quick access. When off, the app runs as a menu-bar-only app (you can still open the main window from the tray).
general.close_to_tray_hint: When on, closing the main window hides it to the tray; otherwise a confirm dialog appears each time.
general.update_policy_hint: Choose how OpenSpeech handles new versions discovered in the background.
general.update_check_interval_hint: How often the app polls in the background. The first check still runs at launch.

asr_segment.realtime_hint: Server splits at pauses and streams partials in real time. Best for long meeting captions, live transcription and other unattended scenarios.
asr_segment.utterance_hint: Treat the whole recording as a single utterance and return the transcript only after you release the key. The model gets full context — more accurate and won't be split by pauses.

ai_refine_toggle.label: Enable AI enhancement
ai_refine_toggle.hint: On top of "whole utterance", run an LLM pass to remove fillers, dedupe, and recognise self-corrections. Same language — no translation.

model.byo_unavailable_body: Custom STT REST endpoints (endpoint URL / API Key / model name / test connection) aren't wired up yet. All dictation currently goes through OpenLoaf SaaS. This surface is under active development and will be enabled in the next release.
model.api_key_hint: Stored in the system keychain; saved automatically on blur.
model.key_saved_toast: API Key saved to system keychain

ai.mode_saas_hint: Use the fast chat model on your signed-in OpenLoaf account; billed by credits.
ai.mode_custom_hint: OpenAI-compatible endpoints with your own API Key. Multiple providers allowed, but only one active at a time.
ai.provider_api_key_hint: Stored in the system keychain; saved automatically on blur.
ai.provider_test_missing_fields: Base URL or model is empty
ai.prompts_hint: Defaults follow the interface language. Edit to customize; the same custom prompt then applies to all languages.
ai.polish_scenarios_hint: Source for the chip list at the bottom of the AI Toolbox "Polish" tab; the selected scenario's instruction is appended to the polish system prompt at runtime.
ai.polish_scenario_instruction_placeholder: e.g. Target scenario: business email. Formal tone. Use greeting / body / sign-off paragraphs.
ai.include_history: Send the last 5 dictations as context
ai.include_history_hint: Recent transcripts help the model carry over tone and terminology.

dictation_lang.label: Dictation language
dictation_lang.hint: Pick the language you'll speak in. "Follow interface" derives it from your interface language.

dictation_provider.mode_saas_hint: Use the speech recognition managed by your OpenLoaf account, billed via credits.
dictation_provider.mode_custom_hint: Connect directly to Tencent Cloud / Aliyun with your own keys, bypassing the SaaS.
dictation_provider.tencent_credentials_hint: Stored in the OS keychain; saved automatically on blur. Get them from the Tencent Cloud console → API Keys.
dictation_provider.tencent_cos_bucket_hint: Required: recordings are uploaded to your Tencent COS bucket before transcription (single file ≤512MB). Leaving this blank falls back to base64 inline upload, which the Tencent file API caps at 5MB — anything larger will fail.
dictation_provider.aliyun_api_key_hint: Stored in the OS keychain; saved automatically on blur. Get it from the DashScope console.

test_code.service_not_enabled: Credentials valid, but the speech service is not yet enabled on this account
test_code.network: Network unreachable; check connectivity and firewalls
test_code.cos_unauthorized: ASR credentials are valid, but this SecretId cannot access the COS bucket
test_code.cos_not_found: ASR credentials are valid, but the COS bucket does not exist or the region does not match
test_code.oss_policy_failed: ApiKey is valid, but fetching the OSS upload policy failed: this account may not have DashScope audio file resources enabled

about.update_channel_hint: Beta gets new features sooner but may be unstable. Switching back to Stable only delivers updates whose version is higher than the current beta.
